title: micropsis spathulata
intro: Micropsis spathulata is a perennial herbaceous plant, also known as the "narrow-leaved micropsis" or "narrow-leaved micropis", which belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Micropsis spathulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and decoctions, where they are believed to promote overall well-being and vitality.
